sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81658" key="perili/paros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιλίπᾰρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n81658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very moist and shiny</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βλέμμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.71</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
